works.content: THE LATEST COON SPASM! AS SUNG NIGHTLY WITH GREAT SUCCESS BY GENARO & BAILEY IN RAY'S ''A HOT OLD TIME'' THERE'S A NIGGER IN THE MOON By J.W.
